title: shubham-amazon
content:
PS-001 — Product Search & Add to Cart
Module: Product Search
Tags: regression, smoke
Priority: High

Description:
Verify that a user can search for a product on Amazon India, view search results, open a product detail page, and add the product to the cart successfully.

Acceptance Criteria:

User should be able to open the application URL successfully.
User should be able to view the Amazon homepage.
User should be able to locate the search bar on the homepage.
User should be able to enter "productName" in the search field.
User should be able to click the search button or press Enter.
User should be redirected to the search results page.
User should be able to view the list of matching products.
User should be able to see product name, price, ratings, and image in search results.
User should be able to click on a product from search results.
User should be redirected to the product detail page (PDP).
User should be able to view product title, description, price, delivery details, and availability.
User should be able to select product variations if applicable (size, color, etc.).
User should be able to click the "Add to Cart" button.
User should be able to see confirmation that the product is added to the cart.
User should be able to see the cart icon updated with item count.
User should be able to navigate to the cart page.
User should be able to verify the selected product is present in the cart.
User should be able to update quantity or remove the product from the cart.

Test Data:

url: https://www.amazon.in/
productName: samsung s26 ultra
quantity: 1
